headline: Jacobs Solutions (NYSE:J) Reports Strong Q1 CY2026
summary: Global professional services company Jacobs Solutions (NYSE:J) reported revenue ahead of Wall Street’s expectations in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 72.7% year on year to $3.69 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $1.75 per share was 7.1% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: Jacobs reports strong fiscal second quarter 2026 results
summary: DALLAS, May 05, 2026--Jacobs Solutions Inc. (NYSE: J) today announced its financial results for the fiscal second quarter ended March 27, 2026.
